You can also get this in black, though it’s currently down to $89.99 shipped with a relatively lighter deal. Head below for more details.

items.title: HP’s new 3K OLED touchscreen OmniBook Ultra with Snapdragon X2 Elite hits lowest price at $500 off
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on Windows laptops for Father’s Day, Best Buy is offering the latest HP OmniBook Ultra 14-inch 3K OLED touchscreen Copilot+ PC for $1,749.99 shipped. This is one of the newer notebooks powered by Qualcomm’s Snapdragon X2 Elite processor, and it carries a $2,250 price tag. Today’s Best Buy deal, however, delivers a straight-up $500 discount on it to mark the lowest price we have tracked for it. This is also the first notable price cut on the recently launched model and one of the best deals we’ve tracked on any Snapdragon X2 Elite-powered laptop to date. It’s a pretty good price considering you’re getting 32GB RAM and a 1TB SSD to deliver a better value for your money compared to the new Samsung Galaxy Book6 Edge that debuted just yesterday with 16GB RAM for $2,100. Head below for more details.

items.title: Jackery’s Early Prime Father’s Day Sale offers up to 65% power station discounts + up to 7% bonus savings – all starting from $199
items.summary:
Update 06/15: Jackery has merged its Early Prime Day savings with its Father’s Day offers, with initial prices staying the same, while the three bonus savings codes have been switched up. All the information below has been adjusted to reflect the current lineup.

Jackery has officially launched its Early Prime Day Sale with up to 65% discounts on power stations, three tiers of extra savings codes (3%, 5%, 7%), and a chance to win your order for FREE with a simple email subscription. If you want to really take advantage of the biggest savings to score a home backup companion, you can score the Jackery 5,040Wh Explorer 5000 Plus Portable Power Station with two 500W solar panels and a Smart Transfer Switch for $4,649.07 shipped (or check out the bigger bundles below), after using the code OFFER7 at checkout, beating Amazon’s pricing by $650. While it may carry a $6,499 MSRP direct from Jackery, we only ever saw it climb to that rate earlier in 2026, with things usually starting around $5,889 recently, and discounts only going as low as $4,549 back during Black Friday and $4,499 during last week’s first phase of extra savings. Now, during this sale, you’ll be getting an $1,850 markdown with the bonus savings factored in, giving you the second-best price of 2026 and the third-lowest price overall. Head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Segway offers $850 Early Prime savings on its 88-mile Xafari all-terrain cruiser e-bike for a new $1,550 low, more

Down from a $2,400 full price, we previously saw discounts only taking the cost down as low as $1,800 before this sale, which is where the red colorway is landing. However, jumping on the silver variant scores you a larger-than-ever $850 markdown for a new all-time low price.

items.title: Save $1,400 on Segway’s premium Xyber e-bike with an extra battery for 112 miles of riding at a $2,800 low, more from $1,700
items.summary: Segway has begun its Early Prime Day Sale event, and for folks who want to jump on some of the brand’s advanced e-bikes, now is a great time to do so. One first-time offer during this sale is the premium Xyber Electric Bike which is getting a FREE extra battery down at $2,899.99 shipped from its full $3,300 tag. While we have been seeing this $2,900 all-time low price popping up more frequently since first being offered in February, what is really big here is the bundled extra battery that would normally cost you an additional $1,000. All in all, this deal gives you $1,400 total savings, which is the best package we have seen offered to date. We’ve also rounded up all the brand’s other e-bike offers for you down below, including the new low price on the Xafari e-bike.
